case_title: MERCEDES MARTINEZ VS. DERRICK CHUA DR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY MARTINEZ, MERCEDES AS TO DEFENDANT CHUA DR., DERRICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-27-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-27-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-27-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF MERCEDES MARTINEZ IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY CONCEPTION LORZANO. DEFENDANT DR.DERRICK CHUA IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-27-2019 - JUDGMENT.
